race.description: Mekka Raceday On Sale Now 3YO Fillies Hcp
race.comment: DRAGONNE ROUGE (2) couldn't keep up in the early stages when resuming over 1000m at the Sunshine Coast last start but really lengthened in the closing stages to just miss the placings in a busy finish. Stakes winner who strips fitter and will be terribly hard to resist over the extra 200m today. SWORD OF LEGACY (1) came with a well-timed run to score handsomely last time out over this distance at Eagle Farm. Genuine filly who is nicely in after McMurray's claim. Big chance to go back-to-back. GRINZINGER CHAMP (6) ran on well but was no match for SWORD OF LEGACY when resuming at Eagle Farm recently. Sure to take a lot from that run and with a bit of luck from the wide draw can play a big role. SEQUEL (13) dominated a Class 2 field at Beaudesert last start. Big step up today but can fill a hole without surprising. OUR HUNTRESS (8) never runs a bad race and can kick on now with the maiden win out of the way.
